description: kylie minogue's Darling perfume for women has a fresh and flirty scent for day or evening wear. It's a sweet fragrance with top notes of passion fruit, freesia, lilies and middle notes of boronia and base notes of vanilla, sandalwood and amberwood.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesAvoid spraying near the eyes
